tasks.label: xv6: build with Docker
tasks.command: docker run --rm -v "${workspaceFolder}/xv6":/xv6 -w /xv6 ubuntu:22.04 bash -lc 'apt-get update >/tmp/apt.log && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y make gcc gcc-i686-linux-gnu binutils-i686-linux-gnu >/tmp/apt-install.log && make TOOLPREFIX=i686-linux-gnu- && make TOOLPREFIX=i686-linux-gnu- fs.img'

tasks.label: xv6: run testsymlink with Docker/QEMU
tasks.command: docker run --rm -v "${workspaceFolder}/xv6":/xv6 -w /xv6 ubuntu:22.04 bash -lc 'apt-get update >/tmp/apt.log && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y make gcc gcc-i686-linux-gnu binutils-i686-linux-gnu qemu-system-x86 >/tmp/apt-install.log && make TOOLPREFIX=i686-linux-gnu- && make TOOLPREFIX=i686-linux-gnu- fs.img && (sleep 5; echo testsymlink; sleep 4; printf "\001x") | make TOOLPREFIX=i686-linux-gnu- QEMU=qemu-system-i386 qemu-nox'

tasks.label: xv6: clean with Docker
tasks.command: docker run --rm -v "${workspaceFolder}/xv6":/xv6 -w /xv6 ubuntu:22.04 bash -lc 'apt-get update >/tmp/apt.log && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y make gcc-i686-linux-gnu binutils-i686-linux-gnu >/tmp/apt-install.log && make TOOLPREFIX=i686-linux-gnu- clean'
